title: SOC2 Type II & Trust Services Criteria
description: Architect and document automated controls for Security, Availability, and Processing Integrity. Implement controls for Confidentiality and Privacy to satisfy rigorous recurring SOC2 Type II audits.
objectives: Architect and document automated controls for Security, Availability, and Processing Integrity.
Implement controls for Confidentiality and Privacy to satisfy rigorous recurring SOC2 Type II audits.
